metaTitle: Unity Gate | Clinical HealthTech & Psychology Platform
metaDescription: Unity Gate is a HealthTech platform providing clinical-standard online therapy, expert matching, and secure matchmaking against the loneliness crisis.
metaExpertTitle: Expert Registration | Unity Gate Clinical Platform
metaExpertDesc: Join the Unity Gate HealthTech platform as a licensed expert. Take your place in a secure online therapy and clinical matching ecosystem.
heroSubtitle: Unity Gate is a military-grade encrypted psychology platform that enables intent-driven matching and secure relationships under the supervision of licensed experts.
bento1Desc: We map your loneliness using scientific UCLA data. Let our algorithm chart the best path for you.
bento2Desc: Reliable support with a professional team approved by global standards.
bento3Desc: Complete privacy with end-to-end military-grade encryption protocols.
visionDesc: Unity Gate stands as an unshakable fortress of trust and professionalism in digital matching and consulting. Our vision is to spread corporate standards globally that guarantee sincerity and safety in human relationships and professional support.
process1Desc: Meet people who share your vision in dedicated interest rooms.
process2Desc: Socialize in military-grade encrypted groups under expert supervision.
process3Desc: Overcome the feeling of loneliness through collective consciousness and empathy.
process4Desc: Unity Gate is always with you. Coming soon to the App Store and Google Play.
expertAuthSubtitle: Unity Gate is a highly secure HealthTech ecosystem that exclusively accepts licensed experts who have successfully passed our verification processes.
formSubtitle: Please enter your preliminary info to join our secure network.
passwordHint: Must be at least 8 characters, including an uppercase letter and a number.
termsText: By joining the Unity Gate platform as an expert, you agree in advance to fully comply with international psychological counseling ethics, strictly uphold client confidentiality under all circumstances, and act in accordance with GDPR/KVKK norms. All sessions are end-to-end encrypted; behaviors violating platform rules will result in permanent removal.
agreeTerms: I have read and fully authorize the international expertise terms and privacy protocol.
errPasswordMismatch: Passwords do not match! Please check.
errPasswordLength: Your password must be at least 8 characters.
errSubCategory: Please select at least one sub-specialty.
footerTagline: Designed for a more connected and secure society at clinical standards.
footerCopyright: © 2026 Aeternexus Health Technologies. All rights reserved.
